requirements.task_name: Book the closest 4.5+ star standard oil change under $70 for next Saturday morning
requirements.task_description: Schedule a standard oil change priced under $70 at the closest location with a rating of at least 4.5 stars within the ZIP 30301 area, for next Saturday between 9:00–11:00 AM.

requirements.task_name: Apply a 15%+ brake service coupon to a front brake pad replacement and go to checkout
requirements.task_description: Find a brake service coupon offering at least 15% off, apply it to a front brake pad replacement service priced under $350, and proceed to the checkout summary.

required_variables.set_condition: Set when getCheckoutSummary() successfully generates a checkout summary (i.e., after _getOrCreateCart() returns a cart object). This should be set on every invocation of getCheckoutSummary.
required_variables.reason: Existing storage lets the evaluator verify that the cart contains a front brake pad replacement service with a ≥15% brake coupon and pre-discount price < $350, but there is no persistence that the user actually navigated to the checkout summary page. This flag non-invasively records that final navigation step.

requirements.task_name: Select the 2018 Honda Civic maintenance plan with the longest warranty under $50/month
requirements.task_description: For a 2018 Honda Civic, compare the first two maintenance plans and choose the plan that has the longer warranty duration while keeping the monthly cost under $50, then add that plan to the cart.

required_variables.set_condition: Set when getCartSummary() is called to generate the cart view (after _getOrCreateCart() returns a cart).
required_variables.reason: Records that the user navigated to the cart page after adding a maintenance plan. Combined with existing cart and maintenance_plans data, this allows the evaluator to confirm both that the correct plan is in the cart and that the cart view was reached.

required_variables.set_condition: Set when getCheckoutSummary() is called to generate the checkout summary (after _getOrCreateCart() returns a cart).
required_variables.reason: Records that the user navigated to the checkout summary page after adding a maintenance plan. The task is satisfied if either the cart view or checkout summary view is reached with the correct plan in the cart; this flag covers the checkout path.

requirements.task_name: Request an engine diagnostics quote with the earliest morning drop-off within 3 days
requirements.task_description: Submit a quote request for an engine diagnostics/check engine light service at the nearest location to ZIP 60601, choosing a drop-off time between 8:00–10:00 AM on the earliest available date within the next 3 days.

requirements.task_name: Book the cheapest same-day flat tire repair after 6 PM at a shop open past 7 PM
requirements.task_description: For ZIP 94110, find a flat tire repair service appointment for today at a location that closes at or after 7:00 PM, and select the lowest-priced available time slot after 6:00 PM.

requirements.task_name: Schedule a 30,000-mile service with free shuttle within 5 miles under $200
requirements.task_description: From ZIP 75201, choose a location that offers a free shuttle service up to 5 miles, schedule a 30,000-mile maintenance service priced under $200, and select the free shuttle option with a specific pickup address.

requirements.task_name: Purchase a $100 email-delivery gift card and proceed to checkout
requirements.task_description: Buy a $100 gift card set for email delivery by filling in sender and recipient details, add it to the cart, and navigate to the checkout page.

required_variables.set_condition: Set when getCheckoutSummary() is called to build the checkout summary (after _getOrCreateCart() returns a cart).
required_variables.reason: Existing storage verifies that a $100 email-delivery gift card with the correct sender and recipient details is in the cart, but does not show that the user actually proceeded to the checkout page. This flag records that navigation step without affecting business logic.

requirements.task_name: Set up 3-month maintenance reminders for a 2020 Toyota Camry via email and SMS
requirements.task_description: Create a maintenance reminder schedule for a 2020 Toyota Camry with current mileage of 25,000, assuming 10,000 miles per year, with reminders every 3 months and notifications sent by both email and SMS.
